chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.73 of 2024 Mst. Fatima Versus Asghar Jaffar Ali & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection and reply at “A” 2. For orders on CMA 421/24 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 02.04.2024 Mr. Samsam Ali Khan for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for appellant, after some deliberations in relation to the impugned order, submits that he would not press this appeal as apparently the impugned order was passed in relation to admitted properties and not those which were transferred during the life time of the deceased on the strength of some registered instruments. Learned counsel on such understanding of law and fact does not press this appeal which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
